package rulecoverage

func NegativeErrorLoggedAndReturned() string {
    ruleID := "error_logged_and_returned"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`log.Error(err); return err` or `logger.Error(\"failed\", zap.Error(err)); return fmt.Errorf(\"failed: %w\", err)` \u2014 logging the error then returning it"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
